text.heading: Calling police IG
text.p: SIR: I wish to use your widely read newspaper to let the Inspector General of Police, the Minister for Police Affairs and the Police Service Commission to know what is happening at zone 6 police headquarters Calabar. I want them to know that police work has broken down in that zone due to the activities of the Commissioners of Akwa Ibom and Rivers States police command.

I was meant to understand that discipline and obeying orders are the bedrock of the force, but in zone 6 Calabar, it is not so because the Commissioners of Police mentioned above are above the law and richer than the AIG at Zone 6, hence they don’t obey his orders. We in Rivers State have had enough of Bala Hassan and will soon take action against him because in Rivers State, it is the highest bidder that wins a case. If you are poor, forget about your case in my state because if even your brother or relation is murdered, the murderer will win the case and even jail you, so long as he has money to bribe Bala and his officers.

In case you don’t get justice at state and venture to go to Zone 6 from Rivers State you will be disgraced. Whenever the men from Zone 6 come with letter of investigation duly signed by the Deputy Commissioner of Police, Bala will reject it and send the policemen back as if the police command is now a private estate where the owner is in charge. The worst is that the AIG, Mr. Azubuko Udah, will have no say. I don’t know if it is due to incompetency or he is afraid to caution his juniors or because they are richer than him.

The question now is: do policemen from the zones have the power to operate in states under their zone? Is it right for a Commissioner of Police under any zone to reject investigation mandate duly signed by either AIG or Deputy Commissioner of Police from the zone?

Finally, I want the IGP and other relevant authorities to look into this indiscipline going on at Zone 6 Calabar, so that poor people will not be subjected to suicide due to activities of Rivers and Akwa Ibom Police Commissioners.
